sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and amt1 = 0 and amt2 = 0
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr, Flex1 = FxTransOffset from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set FSitem = f.FSitem, FSitemDesc = f.FSitemDesc from TransX t inner join Fsitems f on t.GL >= f.FromGL and t.GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set PCdesc = c.Name, Flex5 = c.ExposureLoc, Flex6 = c.Division, Crcy = c.Crcy from TransX t inner join Companies c on t.Co = c.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set CCdesc = 'Cash & Investments', TPname = 'unassigned',  Zone = 'I'  where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set TPname = m.Descr, Zone = m.Field3 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.GL >= m.Field1 and t.GL <= m.Field2 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m.Table_ID = 'R45' and m.ID = 'GL'
update TransX set CCdesc = 'Non-Investment'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Flex1 like '359%' or Flex1 like '3571' or Flex1 like '3572%')
update TransX set Rate1 = r.Rate from TransX t inner join CrcyRates r on t.Crcy = r.Crcy where KeyID = '[batchID]' and r.Typ = 'S' and r.EffDate = '2019-09-30'
update TransX set Rate2 = r.Rate from TransX t inner join CrcyRates r on t.Crcy = r.Crcy where KeyID = '[batchID]' and r.Typ = 'S' and r.EffDate = '2019-12-31'
update TransX set Amt3 = round(Amt1 + Amt2,2) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Rate3 =Rate2 - Rate1 , Rate4 = (Rate1 + Rate2)/2 where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Amt4 = round(-Amt1 * Rate3,2), Amt5 = round(-Amt2 * (Rate2-Rate4),2) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Amt6 = round(Amt4 + Amt5,2) where KeyID = '[batchID]'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, GL, Amt1, Amt2) values ('[batchID]','[Yr][Mo]',[Yr],[Mo],
